features: NATURAL VITAMIN C RADIANCE : VITAQUEEN Acerola 40% delivers a dewy infusion, toning skin, restoring glow, and boosting health for radiant, glass-like skin – hello, glow-up!
TRIPLE BEAUTY REMEDY : Niacinamide 4% + Arbutin 2% swoop in to visibly improve the look of spots, help skin look clearer and even for a flawless complexion.
ANTI-AGING & SKIN VIBRANCE SOLUTION: Vitamin E, Ferulic Acid & Tranexamic Acid enhance radiance, reduce wrinkles, and support a youthful, smooth texture.
DEEP MOISTURE & BARRIER REPAIR : 5 ceramides + 8 hyaluronic acids lock in hydration, strengthen your barrier, and leave skin soft, supple – perfect for people with sensitive skin too!
LIGHTWEIGHT, NON-STICKY SELF CARE : EWG Green Grade, silicone/paraben-free drops formula absorbs fast, perfect for neck, face, body application.
EWG VERIFIED: Every ingredient is carefully selected to meet the highest standards for purity and safety.
products.ingredients: Malpighia Glabra (Acerola) Fruit Water, Water, Butylene Glycol, Glycerin, Cetyl Ethylhexanoate, Niacinamide, 1,2-Hexanediol, Arbutin, Hydrogenated Lecithin, Pentaerythrityl Tetrabehenate, Diethoxyethyl Succinate, Betaine, Ceramide NP, Hydroxyethyl Urea, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Melia Azadirachta Leaf Extract, Cetearyl Alcohol, Squalane, Melia Azadirachta Flower Extract, Panthenol, Curcuma Longa (Turmeric) Root Extract, Tocopherol, Carbomer, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Tromethamine, Xanthan Gum, Allantoin, Ethylhexylglycerin, 2,3-Butanediol, Ocimum Sanctum Leaf Extract, Disodium EDTA, Sodium Hyaluronate, Sodium Carboxymethyl Beta-Glucan, Corallina Officinalis Extract, Malpighia Glabra (Acerola) Fruit Extract, Glyceryl Stearate, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Hydrolyzed Sodium Hyaluronate, Hyaluronic Acid, Hydroxypropyltrimonium Hyaluronate, Potassium Hyaluronate, Rubus Fruticosus (Blackberry) Fruit Extract, Vaccinium Macrocarpon (Cranberry) Fruit Extract, Vaccinium Angustifolium (Blueberry) Fruit Extract, Rubus Idaeus (Raspberry) Fruit Extract, Sambucus Nigra Fruit Extract, Ceramide NS, Ceramide AS, Ceramide AP, Cholesterol, Ferulic Acid, Glutathione, Tranexamic Acid, Adenosine, 3-O-Ethyl Ascorbic Acid, Pentylene Glycol, Sodium Hyaluronate Crosspolymer, Sodium Acetylated Hyaluronate, Ceramide EOP
products.safetyWarning: For External use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If any adverse reaction occurs, stop using the product. Inform your doctor if your condition persists.

products.description: Product Features: Material: glass Color: Clear Size: Bottom Diameter 14mm/0.56inch, Height 50mm/2inch, Top Diameter 25mm/1inch Package Includes: 4 Pcs Glass Tube,4 glass funnels and 2 x Cleaning Brushes
features: Made from premium BOROSILICATE GLASS, our set includes 4pcs GLASS FUNNELS and 4pcs GLASS TUBE designed for LAB-GRADE applications in labs, homes, and kitchens. Perfect for precise experiments, ensuring durability and heat resistance.

Features a 14MM THREADED ADAPTER for easy connectivity, compatible with various lab equipment. The LAB-GRADE DIFFUSER ensures a streamlined process for scientific testing and other meticulous applications.
Includes 2PCS CLEANNING BRUSHES to keep your tools pristine, enhancing longevity and maintaining optimal performance Ideal for both professionals and enthusiasts conducting complex experiments.

The scientific test funnel down stem provides superior functionality, ideal for transferring liquids without spills or messes. Constructed from BOROSILICATE GLASS, it withstands harsh conditions in the laboratory.
Easily integrate this set into any lab setup with its versatile design. Use the 14MM ADAPTER for seamless attachment and enjoy the precision and reliability of our 5.5 LAB-GRADE DIFFUSER and funnels
products.title: 10 pcs Lab-Grade Borosilicate Glass 14mm Threaded Adapter with 4pcs Funnels and Glass Tubes, 2pcs Cleaning Brushes, Essential for Scientific Experiments in Labs, Homes and Kitchens, Includes Diffuser
